name: @sagemark/seo-spike-capability-enforcement
description: PR 000 Phase-0 de-risking spike: adversarial probes that prove (or falsify) Vercel Sandbox + Claude Agent SDK capability-denial. Ships no production runtime.

scripts.probe:all: tsx boot-refusal-probe.ts && tsx egress-probe.ts && tsx env-scrub-probe.ts && tsx fs-constraint-probe.ts

comment: Run-time deps are NOT installed in this workspace by default (this is a spike, not a shipped surface). The live Sandbox run requires `@vercel/sandbox` (and a `tsx`/`ts-node` runner). See RESULTS.md → 'How to run the live adversarial run'.
